description: baseline: filtered universe, entry_z=2.0, stop_z=6.0, metals pipeline, Jul2025-Mar2026
remove SLV/PAAS (ETF vs miner, lost -343 bps). +231 total bps
remove AG/PAAS (size mismatch). Only SIL/SILJ trades. 80% win, Sharpe 0.45
shorter validation window (150 bars) — no new trades, same result
ADF p<0.15 — pairs pass but z-scores never reach entry
entry_z=1.8 — caught marginal entry that stop-lossed. Reverted
AG/PAAS back + max_hold=5 — max_hold didn't apply (per-pair override). Reverted
max_hold_cap in PipelineConfig (5 for metals) + AG/PAAS. BEST: +413 total bps
max_hold_cap=7 — AG/PAAS went negative at day 7. Cap=5 is optimal. Reverted
lookback=20 — per-pair override active, no change. Theoretically better.
exit_z=0.5 — no change (frozen exit overrides). Reverted.
drift stop at 2.0 — never fired (max drift was 1.88)
drift stop at 1.5 — too aggressive, cut SIL/SILJ winners. Reverted
drift stop disabled (max_drift_z=0.0). Feature kept for future use
cost_bps=50 stress test — STILL PROFITABLE (+253 bps). Edge survives. Reverted to 30.
